checks.label: Qwen-compatible chat request shape
checks.evidence: The client defaults to DashScope compatible mode and posts chat/completions payloads with model, messages, and temperature.
checks.public_next_step: When the account owner supplies a runtime key, run the live proof command and publish only a short non-secret excerpt.

checks.label: Runtime-only secret boundary
checks.evidence: The client reads Qwen/DashScope keys only from runtime environment variables and the ledger does not store an API key.
checks.public_next_step: Keep API keys out of chat, screenshots, commits, logs, and Devpost; remove the environment variable immediately after the smoke test.

checks.label: Alibaba Function Compute custom-container manifest
checks.evidence: The checked-in Serverless Devs manifest targets Alibaba Function Compute with the PrizePilot container on port 8000.
checks.public_next_step: Deploy only after the account owner approves Alibaba Cloud account, credit, region, and billing implications.

checks.label: Public HTTP endpoint proof targets
checks.evidence: The manifest declares a public HTTP trigger and health check path that map to the dashboard and API proof plan.
checks.public_next_step: After deployment, verify the public endpoint at / and /api/plan before updating Devpost.

checks.label: Dashboard and API judge payload
checks.evidence: The local web payload exposes the submitted Qwen target, route status, judge scorecard, approval queue, and evidence gaps.
checks.public_next_step: Use the same payload as the expected success signal for a live Alibaba endpoint proof.

checks.label: Public claim boundary
checks.evidence: The public live-proof gate states what is verified and what remains account-gated.
checks.public_next_step: Do not strengthen the public Devpost claim until live Qwen and/or Alibaba evidence actually exists.

secret_policy: No API keys, raw headers, account IDs, billing data, payout data, tax data, KYC data, cookies, or private console pages are required or stored.
next_live_evidence: Runtime Qwen/DashScope smoke test with account-owner supplied key.
Alibaba Cloud Function Compute deployment approved and run by the account owner.
Public endpoint proof for / and /api/plan with no private console chrome.
